regulation_name: Australian Consumer Law (Certification and approval claims)
citation: Australian Consumer Law — Schedule 2, s 29 (False certifications)
summary: False or misleading representations about approvals, certifications, or quality marks are prohibited.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Certification logo, award, or approval badge in creative. ACTION: WARN — verify certification validity and scope. CHECK: Certifying body, product scope, and expiry. ESCALATE IF: False certification or mark beyond scope.
